title: vl_file_copy and  vl_hier_graph files are missing from examples/xml_py
body:
No examples, files vl_file_copy and  vl_hier_graph are missing from /usr/share/verilator/examples/xml_py/
Only Makefile  sub.v  top.v are  in the directory.

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
Verilator 4.212 2021-09-01 rev UNKNOWN.REV

Would you be willing to try to fix Verilator yourself with assistance?
I would be happy to help.

The Makefile only copy files with .[chv]* extensions for examples. So 2 lines should be added: 
```
/bin/sh ./src/mkinstalldirs /data/arc/verilog/pkg/verilator/usr/share/verilator/examples/xml_py
mkdir /data/arc/verilog/pkg/verilator/usr/share/verilator/examples/xml_py
cd . \
; for p in examples/*/*.[chv]*  examples/*/Makefile* examples/*/CMakeLists.txt ; do \
  /usr/bin/install -c -m 644 $p /data/arc/verilog/pkg/verilator/usr/share/verilator/$p; \
done

```
This is a possible fix that works:

```
diff --git a/Makefile.in b/Makefile.in
index 06574e83..22dc0ee9 100644
--- a/Makefile.in
+++ b/Makefile.in
@@ -208,7 +208,8 @@ VL_INST_INC_SRCDIR_FILES = \
 
 VL_INST_DATA_SRCDIR_FILES = \
        examples/*/*.[chv]*  examples/*/Makefile* \
-       examples/*/CMakeLists.txt
+       examples/*/CMakeLists.txt examples/xml_py/vl_*
+
 
 installbin:
        $(MKINSTALLDIRS) $(DESTDIR)$(bindir)
```
code_blocks:
/bin/sh ./src/mkinstalldirs /data/arc/verilog/pkg/verilator/usr/share/verilator/examples/xml_py
mkdir /data/arc/verilog/pkg/verilator/usr/share/verilator/examples/xml_py
cd . \
; for p in examples/*/*.[chv]*  examples/*/Makefile* examples/*/CMakeLists.txt ; do \
  /usr/bin/install -c -m 644 $p /data/arc/verilog/pkg/verilator/usr/share/verilator/$p; \
done
